channel.title: PurposeLab Studio Blog
channel.description: Health tips, app guides, and insights from PurposeLab Studio.

item.title: Stop Messaging Yourself on WhatsApp: A Smarter Way to Remember Everything
item.description: The Message Yourself chat becomes an unsearchable mess within a week. Why notes-to-self fail — and how to keep the easy capture while fixing the memory.

item.title: How to Build a Second Brain on WhatsApp (No New App Required)
item.description: A simple, no-setup system for capturing and recalling everything — using the WhatsApp you already have open.

item.title: Why Most People Fail at Journaling (And How to Actually Stick With It)
item.description: Why you quit after 3 days — and the science-backed approach that actually works for busy people.

item.title: Daily Journal vs Mood Tracker: Why You Need Both
item.description: How combining a journal and mood tracking in one place reveals insights neither can show alone.

item.title: Why Water Tracking Apps Are Full of Ads (And What to Do About It)
item.description: The economics behind free hydration apps — and how to find an ad-free alternative that respects your time.

item.title: How Much Water Should I Actually Drink? The Science Behind Daily Hydration Goals
item.description: The 8 glasses rule is outdated. How to calculate your actual daily water intake based on weight, activity, and climate.

item.title: 10 Natural Ways to Lower Blood Pressure (Backed by Research)
item.description: Evidence-based lifestyle changes that can lower your blood pressure by 10–20 mmHg.

item.title: Normal Blood Pressure by Age: Chart and What Your Numbers Mean
item.description: See the BP chart by age group, understand AHA categories, and learn when to see a doctor.

item.title: Why Your Baby Wont Sleep Through the Night (And What Actually Helps)
item.description: Night waking is biologically normal. Sleep cycles, wake windows, settling techniques, and when it gets better.

item.title: How to Track Blood Pressure at Home: A Complete Guide
item.description: Why home monitoring matters, how to take accurate readings, and what the numbers mean per the AHA.

item.title: The Science Behind White Noise and Baby Sleep
item.description: Why babies sleep better with background sounds — the research behind white noise, pink noise, and sound machines.
